visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on the face of an East Asian man in a dimly lit room. He is wearing a light-colored collared shirt and has a serious, concentrated expression as he looks down, presumably at a computer screen just out of frame. The background is dark and blurry, with a few out-of-focus lights visible. In the top left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera cuts to a very dark, over-the-shoulder shot. The man, now seen from behind, is looking towards a window with closed horizontal blinds. The room is almost entirely black, with only the faint outline of the man and the blinds visible. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The shot returns to a close-up of the man's face. He continues to stare intently at the screen, his expression unchanged. The lighting is low, casting shadows on his face. The "风行网" text is still present. A man speaks in a calm, focused, and professional tone, as if giving a command or explaining a procedure. His voice is steady and clear, suggesting he is in a serious, investigative setting. "电话，不是随机搜索这一区打出的电话，这个搜索。
